# Q4 bin 5m + comp count per host per bucket (network beaconing)

**Dataset**: `xdr_data`

C2 beaconing detection — find steady-cadence connections to a single destination. Q4 bin 5m + comp count per host per bucket.

```sql
dataset = xdr_data | filter event_type = ENUM.NETWORK and agent_hostname != null | bin _time span = 5m | comp count() as conns by agent_hostname, _time | sort desc conns | limit 25
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 18). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
